allow: Bash(python -c "import json; e=json.load\(open\('data/excluded.json'\)\); print\(f'entries: {len\(e\)}'\); print\('sample:', e[0] if e else None\)")

Bash(python -c "from src.config import TrainingConfig; c = TrainingConfig.from_yaml\('configs/training/aggressive.yaml'\); print\(f'freeze_backbone_epochs={c.freeze_backbone_epochs}, total_epochs={c.total_epochs}'\); print\(f'lr_phase1={c.lr_phase1}, lr_phase2={c.lr_phase2}'\); print\(f'batch_size={c.batch_size}, early_stopping_patience={c.early_stopping_patience}'\)")

Bash(python -m ruff format --check src/models/backbone.py src/models/convnext.py src/training/train.py tests/unit/test_train.py)
Bash(python -m ruff format src/models/backbone.py src/models/convnext.py src/training/train.py tests/unit/test_train.py)

PowerShell($tcp = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($tcp\) { $tcp | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id \($tcp | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName } else { Write-Output "Port 8000 libre" })
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process -Id 3484,21556 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime | Format-List")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'model_path: {d[\\"model_path\\"]}'\); print\(f'model_version: {d[\\"model_version\\"]}'\); print\(f'num_classes: {d[\\"num_classes\\"]}'\); print\(f'input_shape: {d[\\"input_shape\\"]}'\); print\(f'first 3 classes: {d[\\"class_names\\"][:3]}'\)")
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object {$_.LocalPort -lt 10000} | Select-Object -ExpandProperty LocalPort | Sort-Object -Unique)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pre_commit run --files docker-compose.yml configs/prometheus.yml demo/lib/api_utils.py demo/pages/09_api.py demo/pages/10_monitoring.py)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  #{p[\\"rank\\"]} {p[\\"species\\"]:30s} {p[\\"confidence\\"]*100:5.1f}%'\) for p in d['predictions'][:3]]; print\(f'  model_version: {d[\\"model_version\\"]}'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  {t[\\"labels\\"].get\(\\"job\\"\)} -> {t[\\"scrapeUrl\\"]} [{t[\\"health\\"]}] lastError={t.get\(\\"lastError\\", \\"\\"\)!r}'\) for t in d['data']['activeTargets']]")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  {r[\\"metric\\"].get\(\\"species\\", \\"?\\"\)}: {r[\\"value\\"][1]}'\) for r in d['data']['result']]")
